concepts.name: Graph
concepts.short_definition: A collection of nodes (vertices) connected by edges.

concepts.name: Adjacency List
concepts.short_definition: A way to represent a graph where each vertex has a list of its adjacent vertices.

concepts.name: Adjacency Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A way to represent a graph using a 2D array where entries indicate the presence of an edge.

concepts.name: Queue
concepts.short_definition: A data structure that follows the First-In, First-Out principle.

concepts.name: Visited Set
concepts.short_definition: A collection to keep track of nodes that have already been processed during traversal.

concepts.name: BFS Traversal
concepts.short_definition: A graph traversal algorithm that explores neighbors layer by layer.

concepts.name: Level Order Traversal
concepts.short_definition: Visiting nodes of a graph in order of their distance from the source node.

concepts.name: Shortest Path (Unweighted)
concepts.short_definition: Finding the path with the fewest edges between two nodes in an unweighted graph.

concepts.name: Connected Components
concepts.short_definition: Subgraphs where any two vertices are connected to each other by paths.

concepts.name: Tree Traversal
concepts.short_definition: Visiting nodes in a tree structure, often a special case of graph traversal.
